name: CLKGOTO
description: Clock Goto block - sends clock/event signals to a CLKFROM block via tag
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="..." interfaceFunctionName="CLKGOTO" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="clkgoto" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="CLKGOTO" value="Goto">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="2" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="A"/>
    <data line="1" column="0" value="1"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabInteger as="integerParameters" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="1"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <Array as="objectsParameters" scilabClass="ScilabList">
    <ScilabString height="1" width="1">
      <data line="0" column="0" value="A"/>
    </ScilabString>
  </Array>
  <ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabDouble as="dState" height="0" width="0"/>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="40.0" height="20.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: exprs has 2 rows - tag and tag visibility scope
Tag value 'A' is duplicated in exprs AND objectsParameters
integerParameters=1 maps to the visibility scope setting
Control port has initialState=0.0 (standard for control ports)
criticalRules: First exprs value is the tag name (must match CLKFROM)
Second exprs value is tag visibility scope (1=local, 2=scoped, 3=global)
integerParameters mirrors the visibility scope setting
Can connect to multiple CLKFROM blocks with same tag
Use CLKGotoTagVisibility to control tag scope explicitly
commonUses: Sending event signals across long distances in diagram
Event signal distribution from central source
Connecting event signals across subsystem boundaries
